title: ficus tremula subsp. acuta
intro: Ficus tremula subsp. acuta, also known as the Narrow-leaved Fig, is a subspecies of fig tree native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ficus tremula subsp. acuta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
